2605.23171.title: Understanding and Improving Noisy Embedding Techniques in Instruction Finetuning
2605.23171.paper_summary: Recent advancements in instructional fine-tuning have injected noise into embeddings, with NEFTune (Jain et al., 2024) setting benchmarks using uniform noise. Despite NEFTune's empirical findings that uniform noise outperforms Gaussian noise, the reasons for this remain unclear. This paper aims to clarify this by offering a thorough analysis, both theoretical and empirical, indicating comparable performance among these noise types. Additionally, we introduce a new fine-tuning method for language models, utilizing symmetric noise in embeddings. This method aims to enhance the model's function by more stringently regulating its local curvature, demonstrating superior performance over the current method, NEFTune. When fine-tuning the LLaMA-2-7B model using Alpaca, standard techniques yield a 29.79% score on AlpacaEval. However, our approach, SymNoise, increases this score significantly to 69.04%, using symmetric noisy embeddings. This is a 6.7% improvement over the state-of-the-art method, NEFTune (64.69%). Furthermore, when tested on various models and stronger baseline instruction datasets, such as Evol-Instruct, ShareGPT, OpenPlatypus, SymNoise consistently outperforms NEFTune. The current literature, including NEFTune, has underscored the importance of more in-depth research into the application of noise-based strategies in the fine-tuning of language models. Our approach, SymNoise, is another significant step towards this direction, showing notable improvement over the existing state-of-the-art method.
2605.23171.paper_summary_zh: 最近在教學微調方面的進展為嵌入注入了噪聲，NEFTune (Jain et al., 2024) 使用均勻噪聲設置了基準。儘管 NEFTune 的實證發現均勻噪聲優於高斯噪聲，但這背後的原因仍不明確。本文旨在通過提供全面的理論和實證分析來澄清這一點，表明這些噪聲類型之間的性能相當。此外，我們引入了一種新的語言模型微調方法，利用嵌入中的對稱噪聲。這種方法旨在通過更嚴格地調節模型的局部曲率來增強模型的功能，顯示出比目前的方法 NEFTune 更優越的性能。在使用 Alpaca 微調 LLaMA-2-7B 模型時，標準技術在 AlpacaEval 上的得分為 29.79%。然而，我們的方法 SymNoise 顯著提高了這一得分至 69.04%，使用對稱噪聲嵌入。這比當前最先進的方法 NEFTune (64.69%) 提高了 6.7%。此外，在各種模型和更強的基準指令數據集上進行測試，如 Evol-Instruct、ShareGPT、OpenPlatypus，SymNoise 始終優於 NEFTune。目前的文獻，包括 NEFTune，強調了對基於噪聲的策略在語言模型微調中應用進行更深入研究的重要性。我們的方法 SymNoise 是朝這個方向邁出的另一個重要步驟，顯示出相較於現有最先進方法的顯著改進。
2605.23171.author: Abhay Yadav et.al.
